---
title: "Publications"
title-block: false
bibliography: references.bib
csl: publications.csl
nocite: '@*'
#description-meta: "Information, pdfs, and social metrics of papers"
#page-layout: full 
#back-to-top-navigation: true
title-block-banner: false
css: custom.css 
---


<!--Include academic icons or buttons-->
{{< include /files/includes/_academic.qmd >}}

For a complete list of publications, please see my CV.

## Selected Recent Publications

::: {#refs}
:::

# Research Sponsors

My research has been supported by:

<div class="sponsor-logos">
  <img src="files/images/NSF_logo.png" alt="National Science Foundation">
  <img src="files/images/DOE_logo.svg" alt="Department of Energy">
  <img src="files/images/ONR_logo.png" alt="Office of Naval Research">
  <img src="files/images/Cisco_logo.png" alt="Cisco">
</div>
